'''UniTech''' was a corporation that specialized in the manufacturing and sale of [[Computer/Legends|computers]]. UniTech was also well-known for producing a variety of tools that allowed a person to directly interface with a computer's mainframe. The devices allowed for a quick untraceable entry into the system when a quick fix was important. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] technicians used the devices to override security systems that were malfunctioning and threatened to shut down large portions of the mainframe. At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was able to obtain several of these devices, using them for espionage and the infiltration of secure Imperial facilities.
